content: Phase 2A: Backend foundation — auth (JWT/bcrypt), RBAC, audit log, models, scheduler
Phase 2B: Backend routes — users, athletes, pages, posts, media, menus, documents, events, messages, announcements, invites, audit, analytics, settings, sitemap, robots
Phase 2C: Seed data — 4 staff + 6 members + 6 athletes + 3 pages + 3 posts + 6 docs + 4 events + 2 announcements
Phase 3A: Frontend design tokens + Tailwind config + fonts + base layouts + auth context + router
Phase 3B: Public site — 10 pages with block renderer matching reference
Phase 8: Testing agent end-to-end — 100% pass, 0 bugs across backend/admin/portal/public
